mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PPS_KT_IN_RES WHERE SEQ = #{seq}

SELECT GUBUN gubun, AMOUNT amount, KT_MODE ktMode, O_RES_CODE oResCode, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_KT_IN_RES', 'RES_CODE', O_RES_CODE ) oResCodeNm, O_AMOUNT oAmount, O_OLD_REMAINS oOldRemains, O_REMAINS oRemains, F_PPS_NUMBER_FORMAT(O_REMAINS) oRemainsStr, O_DATA_REQ oDataReq, O_DATA_VA_ID oDataVaId, O_DATA_AMOUNT oDataAmount, O_DATA_OLD_QUOTA oDataOldQuota, O_DATA_QUOTA oDataQuota, O_DATA_VA_REMAINS oDataVaRemains, O_TES_CHARGE_MAX oTesChargeMax, O_TES_BASER oTesBaser, O_TES_CHGR oTesChgr, O_TES_MAGICR oTesMasicr, O_TES_FSMSR oTesFsmsr, O_TES_VIDEOR oTesVideor, O_TES_IPVASR oTesIpvasr, O_TES_IPMAXR oTesIpmaxr, O_TES_SMSM oTesSmsm, O_TES_DATAPLUSV oTesDataplusv, O_REFILL_TIME oRefillTime, O_REFILL_TIME_EXPIRE oRefillTimeExpire, O_REFILL_TIME_INNET oRefillTimeInnet, O_REFILL_TIME_INNET_EXPIRE oRefillTimeInnetExpire, O_REFILL_MSG oRefillMsg, O_REFILL_MSG_EXPIRE oRefillMsgExpire, O_FREE_DATA oFreeData, O_FREE_DATA_EXPIRE oFreeDataExpire, O_FREE_INTL oFreeIntl, O_FREE_INTL_EXPIRE oFreeIntlExpire, O_RECHAR_DAY oRecharDay, O_PASSWD oPasswd FROM PPS_KT_IN_RES WHERE SEQ = #{seq}

choose.when:
SELECT ORGN_ID AS value ,ORGN_NM AS text FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_LVL_CD ='10' AND TYPE_CD='20' AND TYPE_DTL_CD1='SU' AND TYPE_DTL_CD2 ='SU1' AND ORGN_STAT_CD IN ('1', '4')
AND ORGN_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchAgentNm} || '%'
ORDER BY ORGN_ID, ORGN_NM

SELECT ORGN_ID AS value ,'('|| ORGN_ID ||') ' || ORGN_NM AS text FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_LVL_CD ='10' AND TYPE_CD='20' AND TYPE_DTL_CD1='SU' AND TYPE_DTL_CD2 ='SU1' AND ORGN_STAT_CD IN ('1', '4')
AND ORGN_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchAgentStr} || '%'
ORDER BY ORGN_ID, ORGN_NM

SELECT ORGN_ID AS value ,'('|| ORGN_ID ||') ' || ORGN_NM AS text FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_LVL_CD ='10' AND TYPE_CD='20' AND TYPE_DTL_CD1='SU' AND TYPE_DTL_CD2 ='SU2' AND ORGN_STAT_CD IN ('1', '4')
AND ORGN_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchAgentStr} || '%'
ORDER BY ORGN_ID, ORGN_NM

SELECT ORGN_ID AS value ,'('|| ORGN_ID ||') ' || ORGN_NM AS text FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_LVL_CD ='10' AND TYPE_CD='20' AND TYPE_DTL_CD1='SU' AND ORGN_STAT_CD IN ('1', '4')
AND ORGN_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchAgentStr} || '%'
ORDER BY ORGN_ID, ORGN_NM

SELECT ORGN_ID AS value ,'('|| ORGN_ID ||') ' || ORGN_NM AS text FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_LVL_CD = '20' AND TYPE_CD = '30' AND ORGN_STAT_CD IN ('1', '4')
AND ORGN_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchAgentSaleStr} || '%'
AND HGHR_ORGN_CD = #{agentId}
ORDER BY ORGN_ID, ORGN_NM

mapper.select: SELECT CD value, CD_NM text FROM PPS_KT_COMMON_CD WHERE TABLE_NM = 'PPS_RCG_REAL_CMS' AND COL = 'BANK_CODE'
SELECT ORGN_ID value, ORGN_NM text FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_LVL_CD = '20' AND ORGN_STAT_CD IN ('1', '4') AND ORGN_NM LIKE ('%' || #{searchAgentSaleNm} || '%')
SELECT A.CD_VAL AS value, A.CD_TXT AS text FROM PPS_CODE_COMBO A WHERE A.LOV_CD = #{searchLovCd} AND A.USE_YN='Y' ORDER BY SEQ, LOV_CD, DIS_IDX
